title: verbascum adulterinum
intro: Verbascum adulterinum, also known as False Mullein, is a plant species in the figwort family that is often confused with the common Mullein (Verbascum thapsus). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Verbascum adulterinum include soothing coughs, reducing inflammation, and providing relief from colds and flu. The herbal preparations of Verbascum adulterinum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to promote relaxation and improve sleep quality.
